title: MDA Game Lens and manual updates
summary: Forge Method now gives Game Studio a built-in MDA Lens and adds an explicit update command for installed packages.
highlights: Game briefs now generate a compact MDA Trace connecting player feeling, dynamics, mechanics, feedback/UI signals, and proof.
Game guidance now routes MDA, player-feel, fun, dynamics/mechanics, and playtest questions to the right Game Studio flow.
Legacy game briefs without MDA warn instead of breaking; incomplete MDA blocks fail validation.
The new forge-update skill runs manual Git marketplace updates and prints short human patch notes.
